case_title: SOE SOE LWIN VS. CHRISTOPHER ROBERT EDWARDS et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEC-10-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF LWIN, SOE SOE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-19-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LWIN, SOE SOE AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, CHRISTOPHER ROBERT DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-03-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-04-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-19-2002
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, CHRISTOPHER ROBERT DOES 1 TO 25
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
